title: Lead Source Attribution Audit Checklist for Growth Marketers
description: Growth marketers use this step-by-step audit to identify broken UTM tracking, misattributed conversions, and gaps in their lead source reporting inside HubSpot or GA4.
gumroad_description:
LEAD SOURCE ATTRIBUTION AUDIT CHECKLIST FOR GROWTH MARKETERS

Your UTM parameters are probably broken, and you don't know which marketing channels actually generated revenue.

This 20-item checklist walks you through the exact steps to audit your tracking setup, catch misattributed conversions, and plug the gaps in your HubSpot or GA4 reporting. Each item includes the context you need to fix it yourself—no consultant required.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Growth marketers who own demand gen and need to prove what's working
— RevOps professionals cleaning up lead source data after a tool migration
— Marketing leaders who suspect their attribution model is silently killing budgets

WHAT'S INSIDE

— UTM parameter naming conventions that actually stick across campaigns
— Common HubSpot and GA4 configuration mistakes that hide your best channels
— Lead source sync validation steps to catch data gaps before they become reports
— Checklist in Markdown and JSON formats for easy sharing with your team

Stop guessing which channels work.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
